name: @aily-project/lib-seeed-rtc
description: Seeed SAMD21/SAMD51 内置 RTC Blockly库，支持校时、读取 DateTime、闹钟和中断回调。
description_zh_cn: Seeed SAMD21/SAMD51 内置 RTC Blockly库，支持校时、读取 DateTime、闹钟和中断回调。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for Seeed SAMD21/SAMD51 internal RTC with time setting, DateTime reading, alarms, and interrupt callbacks.
author: Seeed Studio
